item.title: Scaffold 1.4.0
item.description:
## Scaffold v1.4.0
### What's New - In-app updates via Sparkle — check for updates without leaving the app - Fixed: unchecked apps no longer create folders or placeholder files in the project output - App folders are now auto-detected by file type — no manual setup required - App icons now load from bundled assets when the app isn't installed on the machine - About Scaffold now shows version and copyright info - Uninstaller now reliably clears all preferences and trial data
### Installation 1. Download `Scaffold-1.4.0.dmg` 2. Open the DMG and drag the **Scaffold** folder to **Applications** 3. On first launch, right-click Scaffold.app → **Open** (required once for unsigned builds)
### System Requirements - macOS 13.0 or later - Apple Silicon or Intel
### Notes This is an unsigned build. macOS will show a Gatekeeper warning on first launch — right-click → Open to bypass it.
